source_verification_note: Savings ranges (p10/p50/p90) calibrated from consulting engagements. industry_sources cite real published works. Note: business-unit-level savings should use the relevant sector-specific lever pack, not this group-level pack.

levers.description: Centralise back-office functions (HR ops, finance ops, IT, procurement, legal) across group companies into a single shared service centre. Eliminate entity-level duplication.
industry_sources: Hackett Group G&A Benchmarks 2024 (thehackettgroup.com) — world-class shared services: 25-35% G&A reduction vs. decentralised model
SEBI LODR — group entity governance and related-party frameworks enabling shared service arrangements
INTERNAL_CALIBRATION — group shared services savings calibrated from 3 India conglomerate G&A transformation mandates

levers.description: Aggregate common spend categories (IT, travel, professional services, utilities, packaging, marketing) across group companies. Negotiate enterprise-level agreements.
industry_sources: M&M FY25 Annual Report (BSE 500520) — group procurement synergies cited for auto and farm equipment sourcing
Aditya Birla Group — group-level procurement arm consolidating spend across Hindalco, UltraTech, Grasim, Fashion & Lifestyle
INTERNAL_CALIBRATION — group procurement savings calibrated from 4 India conglomerate sourcing mandates

levers.description: Identify and divest underperforming or non-core businesses; redeploy capital to high-ROCE businesses. Eliminate holding company overhead for exited entities.
industry_sources: SEBI LODR — board-level portfolio review governance requirements for listed conglomerates
Tata Sons portfolio rationalization: Tata Steel Europe restructuring, Tata AIG stake management — published investor communications
INTERNAL_CALIBRATION — portfolio rationalisation savings from 2 India conglomerate strategic review mandates

levers.description: Implement cash pooling across group entities; optimise inter-company loans at arm's length; reduce gross debt through better working capital management.
industry_sources: SEBI RPT Regulations 2021 — inter-company loan frameworks and arm's-length pricing requirements
M&M FY25 Annual Report — treasury operations and inter-company financing structure detailed in RPT disclosures
INTERNAL_CALIBRATION — group treasury savings from 3 India conglomerate treasury transformation mandates

levers.description: Audit group real estate holdings; exit non-strategic properties; monetise surplus land (listed or unlisted assets); consolidate offices of co-located group companies.
industry_sources: SEBI LODR — disclosure of significant real estate transactions and related-party property arrangements
Aditya Birla Group — surplus land monetisation from legacy manufacturing sites disclosed in annual reports
INTERNAL_CALIBRATION — group real estate monetisation from 2 India conglomerate property review mandates

levers.description: Consolidate ERP, HR, finance, and supply chain IT systems on group-wide platforms. Eliminate redundant SaaS subscriptions across entities. Migrate to group cloud agreement.
industry_sources: Gartner G2000 IT Benchmark 2024 — group-level IT consolidation: 20-30% reduction in per-entity IT spend
Tata Consultancy Services (group IT arm) — Tata group companies' shared IT services model cited in TCS investor materials
INTERNAL_CALIBRATION — group IT rationalisation from 2 India conglomerate technology transformation mandates

levers.lever_name: Integrated ESG Programme & BRSR Compliance Efficiency
levers.description: Build group-level ESG data management system to reduce BRSR compliance cost; identify carbon credit monetisation opportunities; align CSR spend to business-linked programmes.
industry_sources: SEBI BRSR Core Circular 2023 (sebi.gov.in) — mandatory assured BRSR for top-1000 listed entities; integrated platform reduces per-entity assurance cost
M&M FY25 Annual Report — integrated sustainability reporting and CSR spend of ₹1,800 Cr disclosed with outcome metrics
INTERNAL_CALIBRATION — ESG programme efficiency savings from 2 India conglomerate sustainability mandates
